## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [WordPress PHP Coding Standards](https://developer.wordpress.org/coding-standards/wordpress-coding-standards/php/).
- [ ] All PHP output is escaped; all user input is sanitised and nonce-verified.
- [ ] `php -l wp-builder.php` passes with no errors.
- [ ] `node --check assets/admin.js` passes with no errors.
- [ ] I have updated the README or other documentation where relevant.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new external dependencies without prior discussion.
